category_sources: Official Minder docs describe Minder as an open source platform for securing software supply chains, repository configuration, policy enforcement, artifact attestation, and dependency risk management.
source_facts.description says it is a CLI for Stacklok's Minder platform.
display_name_sources: Official docs and website use the product name Minder.
docs_sources: Official dedicated documentation domain docs.mindersec.dev provides Minder product and CLI documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mindersec/minder; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official Minder docs describe CLI usage, repository security policy, supply-chain security, and artifact attestation features.
